results.scenarioName: Get Booking Details - Happy Path (Companions Revealed)
Internal Edit - Change Venue and Time (Happy Path)
Internal Edit - Manual Duo Reassignment (Happy Path)
Create Booking - Client Already Has Non-Terminal Booking (409)
Cancel Completed Booking - Invalid State Transition (400)
Get Booking Details - Companions Always Visible (No Timed Reveal)
errors: Test objective claims "companions ALWAYS visible" but implementation still has timed reveal logic
warnings: Test references v2.0.0 (companions always visible) but implementation enforces timed/status-based reveal
Implementation shows: companions hidden before T-5h AND when status is CANCELLED/COMPLETED

results.scenarioName: Get Booking Details - CANCELLED/COMPLETED Status (Companions Always Visible)
warnings: Test references v2.0.0 (companions always visible) but implementation enforces timed/status-based reveal
Implementation shows: companions hidden before T-5h AND when status is CANCELLED/COMPLETED
Test objective claims "companions always visible" but test expects companions: null for terminal statuses

businessRules: All safety constraints enforced before any mutations
Allocation failure is deterministic (no partial booking)
Artifacts remain stable across reassignment
Artifacts stability preserved across edits
CANCELLED and COMPLETED bookings do not block new bookings
COMPLETED bookings cannot transition to CANCELLED
Cancellation from CONFIRMED is allowed
Cannot edit bookings that have started (now >= start_at)
Cannot edit bookings with progressed match/presence statuses
Cannot edit extended bookings (extended_at != NULL)
Client has no other non-terminal bookings
Companion array ordered: CAPTAIN first, VICE_CAPTAIN second
Companions hidden when current time < (startAt - 5 hours)
Companions hidden when status is CANCELLED
Companions hidden when status is COMPLETED
Companions must be distinct
Companions must have correct designations (CAPTAIN, VICE_CAPTAIN)
Companions revealed when current time >= (startAt - 5 hours) AND status IN (CONFIRMED, ACTIVE)
Duo allocation requires both CAPTAIN and VICE_CAPTAIN
Duo integrity: one CAPTAIN + one VICE_CAPTAIN
Duo remains the same when no reassignment requested
Edit is atomic (all or nothing)
Global state machine enforced: COMPLETED is a terminal state
Idempotent cancellation succeeds
Manual reassignment requires BOTH companion IDs
Non-terminal statuses are CONFIRMED and ACTIVE
One non-terminal booking per client rule enforced
Only INTERNAL token can authorize
Only booking owner can cancel
PATCH /bookings/{id} only allowed on CONFIRMED bookings
Per SDS v1.2.0 section 4.D: companions null when status is CANCELLED or COMPLETED
Privacy protection: companions not revealed too early
Repeated cancellation requests are safe
Roster slots become available for new bookings
Roster slots reserved for exact 2-hour window
Status blocks reveal regardless of timing
System does not create booking without successful duo allocation
System does not fail on already-cancelled bookings
Target duo must be available at booking window
Timed reveal enforced per SDS v1.2.0 section 4.D
Transaction rolled back on constraint violation
Valid cancellation sources are CONFIRMED and ACTIVE only
averageRating is from companion_profiles.average_rating
displayName is from users.nickname (no full name, email, phone)
languages is an array from companion_profiles.languages
profilePictureUrl is from companion_profiles.profile_picture_url

recommendations: ⚠️  Critical: Fix test design errors before execution

📋 SDS Alignment Issue: MOD-BOOKING-011 and MOD-BOOKING-012 reference v2.0.0 claiming "companions always visible", but implementation still enforces timed reveal (T-5h) and status-based blocking (CANCELLED/COMPLETED)
🔧 Action Required: Either (1) Update test designs to match current implementation behavior, OR (2) Update implementation to match v2.0.0 SDS specification
